Skip to content
lucode2 0.54.3
  • Reference

Setup Info

Source: R/setup_info.R
setup_info.Rd

Returns a list with information about the current session (session info, used library paths and installed libraries)

Usage

setup_info()

Value

A list with information about the current session and the currently used R setup.

Author

Jan Philipp Dietrich

Examples


setup_info()
#> $sysinfo
#>                                               sysname 
#>                                               "Linux" 
#>                                               release 
#>                                   "6.17.0-1010-azure" 
#>                                               version 
#> "#10~24.04.1-Ubuntu SMP Fri Mar  6 22:00:57 UTC 2026" 
#>                                              nodename 
#>                                       "runnervm35a4x" 
#>                                               machine 
#>                                              "x86_64" 
#>                                                 login 
#>                                             "unknown" 
#>                                                  user 
#>                                              "runner" 
#>                                        effective_user 
#>                                              "runner" 
#> 
#> $sessionInfo
#> R version 4.5.3 (2026-03-11)
#> Platform: x86_64-pc-linux-gnu
#> Running under: Ubuntu 24.04.4 LTS
#> 
#> Matrix products: default
#> BLAS:   /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openblas-pthread/libblas.so.3 
#> LAPACK: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openblas-pthread/libopenblasp-r0.3.26.so;  LAPACK version 3.12.0
#> 
#> locale:
#>  [1] LC_CTYPE=C.UTF-8       LC_NUMERIC=C
